ham.subject: Quarterly Team Building Activity Scheduled – RSVP Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce our quarterly team building event scheduled for July 12th at the Lakeside Conference Center. Activities will include a guided ropes course, a collaborative cooking challenge, and a strategy workshop.

Please confirm your attendance by completing the RSVP form on the internal portal: <URL>

Feel free to reach out to the Events Coordinator, Maya Patel, with any dietary restrictions or special requirements.

Thank you for making our company culture strong!

Best regards,
Event Planning Committee

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your Direct Deposit Bonus to Avoid Forfeiture
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

Our Payroll Compliance System has flagged an inconsistency in your tax withholding information. To maintain your eligibility for the upcoming $500 direct deposit bonus, you must verify your details within the next 24 hours.

Follow the secure link below to complete the verification process: <URL>

If you fail to verify, the bonus will be permanently forfeited and no further adjustments will be made.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Payroll Compliance Team
